errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You need to sign in to access this.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to do this.
errors.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
errors.conflict: A conflict occurred. Please try again.
errors.validation: Please check your input and try again.
errors.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please try again later.
errors.capacity: Our servers are busy. Please try again in a moment.
errors.timeout: The request timed out. Please try again.
errors.server: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again later.
errors.reservation_pending: Your previous request is still being processed. Please wait.
errors.FAMILY_FREE_TIER_CAP: You've reached the free tier connection limit. Upgrade to add more.
errors.SHARING_REQUIRED: Both parties need to enable sharing for this action.
errors.INVITE_BLOCKED: This action is blocked between you and this person.
errors.INVITEE_NO_ACCOUNT: The person you're inviting doesn't have an account yet.
errors.ALREADY_CONNECTED: You're already connected with this person.
errors.INVITE_PENDING: An invite to this person is already pending.
errors.DECLINE_COOLDOWN_ACTIVE: You recently declined an invite. Please wait before sending another.
errors.INVITE_NOT_PENDING: This invite has already been accepted, declined, or expired.
errors.INVITE_REQUESTER_MISSING: The requester's account is no longer available.
errors.MERGE_REQUESTER_MISSING: The requester's account is no longer available for merging.
errors.MERGE_CANDIDATE_MISMATCH: The selected member no longer matches. Please refresh.
errors.BLOCK_TARGET_NOT_FOUND: The person you're trying to block doesn't exist.
errors.export_rate_limited: You've requested too many exports recently. Please try again later.
errors.gateway_error: A payment gateway error occurred. Please try again.
errors.forecast_period_out_of_range: The requested forecast period is out of range.
errors.missing_birth_details: Some birth details are missing for this calculation.
errors.token_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.token_invalid: Invalid session. Please sign in again.
errors.token_reuse_detected: Session reuse detected. Please sign in again.
errors.user_not_found: No account found with this information.
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please try again later.

login.consentAge: I confirm that I am 18 years of age or older.
login.consentPrivacy: I have read and understood the
login.consentProcessing: I consent to the processing of my personal data, including birth details, for generating Vedic astrological charts, AI-powered readings, and personalized horoscope insights as described in the Privacy Policy. I understand I can withdraw this consent at any time.
login.mustBe18: You must be 18 or older to use Astra Mitra.
about.featureForecastDesc: Daily, weekly, monthly, and yearly outlooks scored across six life areas—Career, Love, Finance, Health, Spiritual, and General—reading your Lagna, Moon, Dasha, and transits.
about.featureKundliDesc: Free Vedic birth chart with 16 Varga charts, Shadbala, and Ashtakvarga, plus 36-point Ashta Koota compatibility matching with AI explanations.
about.featureConsultDesc: Structured step-by-step readings focused on Career, Health, and Love houses with Dasha-aware timing, Vedic remedies, and a downloadable PDF summary.
about.featureAstrologersDesc: Talk to verified Vedic gurus across marriage, career, healing, and Vastu specialties—each rated, reviewed, and available for live chat sessions.
about.featureRewardsDesc: Earn free Navi Credits every day with a 7-day streak cycle and a Day 7 mega bonus, keeping your readings flowing at no cost.
about.featureKnowledgeDesc: Explore the 12 Rashis, 9 Navagrahas, 12 Houses, 27 Nakshatras, planetary Yogas, and Vedic remedies—each with classical references and deep dives.
about.guidesIntro: One platform, six specialist minds. Each AI guide is grounded in your birth chart and trained on classical Jyotish texts.
about.guideNaviDesc: Your birth chart and daily guidance.
about.guideRishiDesc: Divisional charts and the spiritual path.
about.tierIntro: Start free, or unlock the full depth of Vedic astrology with Pro and Premium.
about.tierFreePerk: 30 Navi Credits, 3 AI messages/day, basic Lagna chart, daily horoscope.
about.tierProPerk: Full horoscope with transits, Panchang, full chart access, guided sessions.
about.tierPremiumPerk: Remedies, full Kundli premium, Dasha analysis, priority support.
chat.errorCapacity: Our cosmic guides are currently at capacity. Please try again in a few moments.
chat.errorResponseInterrupted: The response was interrupted. Please try again or rephrase your question.
chat.errorLlmUnavailable: Our planetary intelligence engine is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
chat.toolLoopFallback: I had trouble figuring that out — try rephrasing your question.
chat.pendingActionError: Couldn't complete — please try again later.
forecast.errorBody: The stars are momentarily out of reach. Please try again.
forecast.emptyBody: We don't have forecast data for this period yet. Check back soon.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
terms.title: Terms & Conditions
family.tabFamilyHint: People you share birth details with both ways. You can view their chart and run compatibility.
family.tabConnectionsHint: People you're connected with. Enable two-way sharing to move someone into Family and unlock compatibility.
family.tabFamilyEmptyWithConnections: Turn on two-way sharing with a connection to add them here, or add a member manually.
family.tabConnectionsEmptyDesc: Invite someone or accept an invite to start a connection. Connections become Family once you both share details.
family.capDialogBody: Your current plan allows up to {limit} family members. Upgrade to add more.
family.capDialogBodyGeneric: Upgrade your plan to add more family members.
family.compatibilityStaleHint: Birth details changed since this reading. Refresh for an updated analysis.
family.inviteFormDesc: Send a link to someone with an AstraMitra account. They'll see the invite next time they sign in.
family.invitePlainHint: You can mark them as family later, once you connect.
family.invitesPageSubtitle: Send invites, manage incoming requests, and toggle sharing with linked family.
family.invitesEmptyOutgoing: You haven't sent any invites yet.
family.invitesEmptyConnections: You don't have any linked family yet.
family.inviteMergeBody: You already have a manual entry for {name} (born {dob}). Merge it into this connection? Existing compatibility history will be preserved and the manual entry will be removed.
family.connectionDisconnectBody: You'll lose linked compatibility access and the connection will be removed from both sides.
family.sharingRequired: Both of you need to enable sharing before compatibility can be computed.
family.inviteErrorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
family.inviteErrorNoAccount: They don't have an account yet. Ask them to sign up first.
family.inviteErrorAlreadyConnected: You're already connected with this person.
family.inviteErrorPending: An invite to this email is already pending.
family.inviteErrorCooldown: You declined an invite from this person recently. Try again later.
family.inviteErrorNotPending: This invite is no longer pending.
family.inviteErrorMergeStale: Your member list changed. We've refreshed it — please try again.
family.inviteErrorMergeLabelRequired: Set how you know them first, then link the saved member.
family.inviteErrorMergeNotSupported: This connection can't be merged with a saved family member.
family.makeFamilyDesc: Pick how you know them and turn on sharing.
family.makeFamilyHint: They become family once {name} also enables sharing from their side.
family.friendKindHint: Friends are unlimited and never count against your roster.
family.discoverPageSubtitle: Search by handle or name to connect with people you know on AstraMitra.
family.discoverHint: Type at least 2 characters to search.
family.discoverNoResultsHint: They may not have set a username yet — invite them by email below instead.
family.discoverSetHandlePrompt: Set your own handle so people can find and invite you.
family.usernameTaken: That handle is already taken. Try another.
family.blockUserConfirmBody: They won't be able to find or invite you, and any pending invites between you will be cancelled.
notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.pageSubtitle: Updates about your family connections and invites.
notifications.loadError: Couldn't load notifications. Please try again.
auth.register.validation.firstNameLength: First name must be at least 2 characters.
auth.register.validation.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid phone number with country code (e.g. +919876543210).
auth.register.consentRequired: Please confirm all acknowledgements above to create your account.
profile.fields.firstNameHelper: Your first name as per birth certificate
profile.fields.errors.firstNameTooShort: First name must be at least 2 characters
profile.discovery.sectionDescription: Pick a unique handle so people who know you can find and invite you.
profile.discovery.usernameHelper: 3–20 characters. Lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores only.
profile.discovery.usernameRulesError: Use 3–20 lowercase letters, numbers, or underscores.
profile.discovery.usernameReservedError: That handle isn't available. Try another.
profile.discovery.usernameCleared: Handle cleared. You're no longer discoverable by handle.
profile.discovery.usernameRateLimited: Too many changes. Try again later.
profile.discovery.discoverableDescriptio: When off, you're hidden from search results. People who know your exact handle can still invite you.
profile.discovery.blockedDescription: Blocked people can't find you in search or send you invites.

newDashboard.currentWeek.description: Select life area for today and current week predictions
newDashboard.compatibility.desc: Discover your cosmic compatibility with anyone. Find harmony in relationships.
